CPNoArtifactEncryption.^description: This CodePipeline pipeline is using the default S3 SSE-S3 encryption for artifacts instead of a customer-managed KMS key. Using a customer-managed KMS key provides greater control over artifact encryption, access auditing, and the ability to revoke access.
CPNoArtifactEncryption.shortDesc: Use customer-managed KMS key for pipeline artifacts

CPNoSourceStage.^description: This CodePipeline pipeline does not have a source stage configured. A source stage is required to trigger the pipeline from a code change event in CodeCommit, S3, ECR, or a third-party provider.
